creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Ok, this patch fixing build of devel/ace when security/openssl is 
installed, but it breaks the build with stock openssl. This patch should 
be applied conditionally somehow, or, as was suggested on #bsdports, 
some gcc -W option should be applied instead to suppress this warning.
I tried both and failed, so i return this to the pool, so somebody more 
experienced will take care of it. Sorry.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
